---
title: "HelloWorld: Academic Workflow Sample"
author: "Your Name"
institute: "Your Institution"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, theme-template.scss]
    slide-number: true
    incremental: false
---

# Why This Sample Exists

- Verifies that Quarto is installed and working
- Confirms `/deploy HelloWorld` produces a valid HTML deck
- Provides a starting point before you build real lectures

# Next Steps

1. Render this deck: `/deploy HelloWorld`
2. Preview locally: `quarto preview Quarto/HelloWorld.qmd`
3. Delete this file and create your own lectures

<!--
  DELETE THIS FILE and replace with your own lectures once you're ready.
  This sample has no dependencies beyond Quarto/theme-template.scss so it
  works on a fresh fork.
-->
